title: General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), 2026 neih tura Motor dah na hmun leh dah dan tur chungchanga Aizawl DC thuchhuah
content:
222/2026-2027

General Election to Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC), 2026 neih turah ni 21stApril, 2026 (Tuesday) hian Polling Personnel teDistrict Municipal Election Officer’s Office, Aizawl ah Receivetur a nih avangin ni 21stApril, 2026 hian Office tualah motor eng chi mah dah phal a ni lo a, hetiang hian four wheeler leh two wheeler dah dan tur ruahmanna siam a ni a, Duty ten ruahmanna an siam ang zel a dah tur a ni.

MOTOR DAH NA HMUN LEH DAH DAN TUR

Four Wheeler

Two Wheeler

Assembly Annexe Parking lot Basement-I (Treasury Square).

Officials motor zawng zawng Assembly Annexe Parking lot Basement-I ah dah vek tur a ni.

DC Office, Aizawl ah tian phei in Gate lut lo in, tian tlang tur a ni.

title: E. LUNGDAR-AH POSHAN PAKHWADA - ECCE FESTIVAL HMAN A NI
content:
221/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 20th April, 2026:Vawiin khan E. Lungdar ICDS Project huaihawtin E. Lungdar Futsal Ground-ah Early Childhood Care and Education (ECCE) Festival hman a ni.

He hun hmanpuitu East Lungdar BDO Pi Marilyn Lalruatkimi chuan thu sawiin, kum 6 tlin hma hi naupangte thluak leh taksa ṭhan chak lai ber, an hmalam hun hriltu 'lungphum pawimawh' a nih thu a sawi a. ‘Heng hun chhunga enkawlna leh kaihhruaina dik (ECCE) an dawn chuan, thiamna leh hriselna mai bakah, mi dangte nena khawsak ho dan (social skills) thlengin an thiamin nasa takin an than len zelnaah pawh hma an sawn phah thei a ni’ a ti.

Pu Jeremy Lalhmingsanga, Circle Officer pawhin kum 6 hnuai lam tana zirna kalpui dan ṭha (ECCE method) leh an hmasawnna atana pawimawh hrang hrangte a sawi bawk a. Inelna chi hrang hrang - Naute Invah Chaksiak (Baby Crawling Competition), Teaching Learning Material (TLM) Making Competition leh naupang kal khawmte tana inelna chi hrang hrangte buatsaih niin naupang leh nu leh pa thahnem tak an kalkhawm a ni.

He festival hi Poshan Pakhwada (kar hnih chhung awh hriselna campaign) nena hman kawp niin naute, nute leh naupang enkawl dan leh eitur hrisel (balanced diet) pek pawimawhzia chungchangte leh thil pawimawh chi hrang hrangte inzirtirna hun atan hman thin a ni.

Attachment

title: National Human Rights Commission Special Monitor Dr. Poonam Malakondaiah in Mizoram a tlawh
content:
220/2026-2027

Aizawl the 20th April, 2026 :Ni thum cham tura lo zin National Human Rights Commission Special Monitor Dr. Poonam Malakondaiah chuan vawiin khan Aizawl a thleng a. Women & Child Devlopment leh School Education lam hotuten an lo buaipui a ni.

National Human Rights Commission Special Monitor Dr. Poonam Malakondaiah hian Early Childhood Education lam thlur bingin, Anganwadi Center leh Elementary School kalpui dan a rawn bihchiang dawn a ni.

NHRC Special Monitor hian April ni 21, 2026 ah Saitual a tlawh anga; April ni 22 ah Reiek a tlawh ang. Heng hmunah te hian Anganwadi Center leh Primary/Middle School thenkhat a hmunah a tlawh dawn a. Zirna bultanna lam kalpui dan te, zirna in vawn thianghlim dan te, Midday Meal Scheme kalpui dan te, nutrition leh hrisel na lama an dinhmunte a enchiang dawn a ni.

Pi Lalzarmawii, IAS, Commissioner & Secretary leh Nodal Officer Pi Zonunthari, Joint Secretary, Social Welfare, Women & Child Development te kaihhruaina in Women & Child Development leh School Education lam hotute nen April ni 20,2026 tlaiah inkawm hona neih a ni a. Hetah hian Department pahnihten presentation pein Mizoram dinhmunte an lo hrilhfiah a. Mizoram chu early childhood education kalpui kawngah a titha pawl tak ni mah se, hmasawnna tur tamtak an la awm a, hmalak zel dan turte an sawiho a ni.

Dr. Poonam Malakondaiah hi Andhra Pradesh cadre IAS Officer pension niin July ni 30,2024 khan a retire a. National Human Rights Commission ah hian Special Monitor in January 2026 khan a thawk leh a ni.

Attachment

title: Entry Restricted Inside Polling Booths for Municipal Elections
content:
29/2026-2027

In exercise of the powers conferred under Section 350 of the Mizoram Municipalities Act, 2007 read with Rule 10 of the Mizoram Municipalities (Election of Councillors) Rules, 2007, The State Election Commission, Mizoram has issued an order regulating entry inside polling booths for municipal elections, specifying the categories of persons permitted to be present during voting.

According to the directive, only the following individuals will be allowed entry into polling booths, by the Presiding Officer:

1. The electors;2. ﻿﻿﻿Polling Officers;3. ﻿﻿﻿One polling agent of each candidate at a time;4. ﻿﻿﻿Persons authorized by the Commission;5. ﻿﻿﻿A person accompanying a blind or infirm voter who cannot move or vote without help; and6. ﻿﻿﻿Such other persons as the Presiding Officer may from time to time admit for the purpose of identifying voters or otherwise assisting him in taking the poll.

title: IOCL-in LPG chungchang Press Conference an nei
content:
219/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl: the 20 April 2026 :Vawiin khan Indian Oil Cooperation Ltd. (IOCL), chuan Press Information Bureau (PIB), leh Directorate of Information and Public Relations (DIPR)-te nen tangrualin I&PR Auditorium, Treasury Square-ah, tunlaia eirawngbawlna gas (LPG) kaihhnawiha mipui vantlang hriattur pawimawh chi hrang hrangte inhrilhhriatna atan Press Conference huaihawtin thuthar lakhawmtute nen inkawmhona hun an hmang.

Press Conference-ah hian IOCL hotute chuan West Asia-a Indona vanga khawvel hmun hrang hranga LPG vang leh harsa anga sawi chuan Mizoramah engmah nghawng a nei lo tih chiang takin mipui ten hria se an duh tih an sawi a. Chutih rualin gas chah dan phung felfai zawk kalpui a nih theih nan te, gas bo thlau a awm lohna tur te leh gas-in a neitu dik tak hnen a hun taka a thlen theihna tur tea hmalakna avangin mipuite chu chiai mai lo turin an ngen nghal bawk a ni.

IOCL hotute chuan tun dinhmunah Mizoramah hian chhungkaw 297000 hnenah nitin gas bur 8000 chuang chatlak lovin an pe chhuak reng tih an sawi a. Hei hi Indo hma pawha thil awmdan reng a nih thu an sawi a. Mipuite chu uar leh zuala SMS leh IVRS hmanga digital booking hmang tura sawmin, Delivery Authentication Code (DAC) chu tun hma lam zawng aiin a pawimawh leh zual tawhin, hemi tel lo chuan gas bur khat mah pek chhuah theih a nih tawh meuh loh thu an sawi a. IOCL leh Mizoram sawrkar tanrualnain, State pumah Black Marketting leh hoarding-te dap chhuaka a tul anga hma la tur pawl hrang hrang pawh din an nih thu an sawi bawk a. LPG sem chhuaktute leh sem chhuah a nihdan mumal taka chhinchhiahna pawh kalpui zel a ni tih tarlangin, mipuite chu chiaina tur engmah a awm lo tih hre reng tura chahin, gas bur lo chhek khawl chiam emaw Distributor-te tana phurrit siamsak zawng emaw a awm lo hram turin mipuite chu an ngen bawk a ni.

Vawiina Press Conference-ah hian IOCL hotute leh PIB lama hotute bakah, DIPR aiawh leh LPG  Distributor aiawhte an tel bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL KVK-IN TRAINING BUATSAIH
content:
218/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 20th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan KVK Khawzawl chuan KVK Training Hall-ah Biate khuaa tomato ching tura hma la mek chhungkua 23-te hnenah training an pe a. He hun hi Dr. Malsawmkimi, Senior Scientist & Head chuan kaihruaiin zirtirna a pe nghal bawk a. Hetraining chhim tura kalkhawmte hnenah tomato chi leh thlai chi hrang hrang Indian Institute of Horticulture Research (IIHR-NEH) Scheme hnuai atangin pek nghal an ni bawk.

KVK Khawzawl hian Tomato chinga hma la te theihtawpin an pui thin a, kum 2015 ah Tuipui khua atanga tanin Khawzawl district chhunga khaw hrang hrangah tomato chinga hma la chhungkua engemawzat awm tawhin heng mite hian eizawn nan ber an hmang chho mek zel a ni.

Attachment

title: AMC-2026 INTHLANPUIA DUTY TUR POLLING TEAM TEN AN POLLING STATION THEUH AN THLENG FEL TA
content:
217/2026-2027

AIZAWL; 20th April, 2026:Tukin zing dar 9:00 khan AMC,2026 inthlanpuia General observer te leh Political party :BJP,INC,MNF leh ZPM aiawh te telpuina hnuaiah EVM Strong room atanga EVM te lakchhuah niin, Lammual atangin dar 10:00Am atang khan polling party 263 ten an duty-na hmun tur polling station theuh panin an chhuak a, an duty-na tur polling station theuh tluang takin an thleng fel tih DEO & DMEO office atanga thu dawn a ni. Vawiinah hian Polling team ten Polling station-a tihtur tul te an ti ang a, an area theuhva Polling Agent te nen naktuka felfai tak leh tluang taka  vote thlak a nih theih nan inkawmhona hun te an nei bawk ang. Vawiin polling team fehchhuak ta te bakah hian a tulna hmun leh huna tirhchhuah theih tur Reserve Polling team 20% an la awm bawk. Naktuk vote thlak hi felfai tak leh thianghlim taka kalpui a nih theih nan;  Security duty te bakah Sector officer te leh General Observer ten hneh takin an vil reng dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Saitual District Level Committee on Fire Prevention thu khawm
content:
216/2026-2027

Saitual, the 20th April, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Room, Saitualah, Saitual District Level Committee on Fire Prevention chu Pu Tharun Patnaik, SDO (S) kaihruainain an thu khawm.

He hunah hian Pu Andrew Lalthlamuana, ACF & Member Secretary, District Level Committee on Fire Prevention chuan kangmei ven kawngah khaw hrang hrangina hma an lak tawh thu te a tarlang a, State Level Sub-Committee on Fire Prevention-in a lo rel tawh angin kangmei ven kawnga hma la tha ber khua thlan a ngaih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Saitual District chhunga kangmei ven kawnga hma la tha ber khua thlang turin District Level Monitoring Committee din ni se tih rel a ni a, he committee hian khaw hma la tha zual lawmman pathumna thleng dawng tur leh khaw ti tha dang pathum, consolation prize dawng tur an thlang ang. Distict Level-a khaw ti tha ber hian State level-ah Saitual District ai a awh dawn a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm hi Pu Tharun Patnaik, SDO (S) chuan a kai hruai a, Pu Andrew Lalthlamuana, ACF & Member Secretary, District Level Committee on Fire Prevention bakah District Level Committee on Fire Prevention member te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP BAWRHSAP HOVIN LEISEKAWT FIELD CHEI THAT DAN TUR SAWI HO A NI
content:
215/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 20th April, 2026:Serchhip khawchhung tih hmasawnna tur leh kumin October thlaa Serchhip Leisekawt Field-a neih tur, Rampum Huap Kohhran Pavalai Pawl (KPP) Inkhawmpui atana inpuahchahna ni pahfawmin, vawiin khan Serchhip Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma hovin DC Meeting Hall-ah thutkhawm a ni a. He hunah hian P&E Village Council hruaitute, KPP Organizing Committee hruaitute leh sawrkar official-te an tel a; mikhualte tana nuam zawka hmunhma buatsaih dan tur hrang hrangte sawi ho a ni.

Pu F. Lallawmkima, Superintendent, Deputy Commissioner Office hnen atangin field endikna Inpection kalpui dan leh ruahmanna hrang hrangte ngaihthlak a ni a. Mipuite’n zan thimah pawh him zawk leh hahdam zawka Leisekawt Field an thlen theih nana, Serchhip IOC veng leh Bazar veng inkarah kawng tih enna (street light) vuah belh chungchang te, Pavilion chei that dan tur chungchang te, Pavilion bula vantlang inthiarna chei that dan turte leh Tennis Court bula inthiarna siam belh chungchangte, BDO quarters thlang zawla chawlh hahdamna lailawk siam chungchangte rel a ni a; Field hungna lungremte pawh mawi zawka rawng hnawiha chei thar tum a ni bawk.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan heng hmalaknate hi Serchhip khua tana hmasawnna pawimawh tak a nih avangin chak taka bawhzui a nih tur thu a sawi a. Khawtlang hruaitute leh Pavalai hruaitute pawhin sawrkar hmalakna leh thawhpuinaahte lawmthu sawiin, khawtlang hmasawnna atana hma lakna hrang hrangahte theihtawp chhuaha thlawp zel an inhuam thu an sawi bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB DISTRICT VC TE HNENAH RGSA HNUAIAH COMPUTER SET SEM A NI
content:
214/2026-2027

Kolasib, 20th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Kolasib DC Conference Hall ah District Local Administration Office (DLAO) Kolasib buatsaihin Kolasib District chhunga Village Council (VC) te hnenah Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) scheme hnuaia computer set dawn te sem chhuahna hun hman a ni a. He hun hi Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan Khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian, Kolasib DC Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, Local Administration Department chu amah nen pawh inzawmna an lo nei tawh a ni tiin, Joint Secretary pawh a lo nih tawh thin thu a sawi a, vawiina hetiang hun hman a ni chu a lawmawm takzet a ni, a ti. Hmasawnna kawngah VC ten tihtakzeta an khua an enkawl chuan khawtlang a changkang thin a ni, a ti a. Khawtlang hmasawn zel nan District Administration pawhin theih anga VC te hmalakpui zel a tum thu a tarlang. DC chuan vawiina computer sem chhuah te chu a dawngtu VC ten hmang tangkai turin a chah a, information leh data vawn that nan te leh thil pawimawh dang atana an tangkaipui ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Dr. Lalngura Tlau, Director, LAD pawhin thu sawiin, computer set te hi RGSA scheme hnuaia sawrkarin VC te a pek a nih thu a sawi a. Kolasib District chuan RGSA scheme kal hmasa zawkah computer an lo dawn nual tawh avangin vawiinah hian dawng an tam lo a ni, a ti.

Director chuan VC te hmasawn zel na tura Department hmalakna te tarlangin LAD Department chuan 15th Finance Commission atanga sum hmuh theih te chu a bo a bang awm lovin an hmuh thu sawiin, District Panchayat Resource Centre (DPRC) chu district 8-ah a awm tawh thu leh, Aizawl, Lunglei leh Kolasib ah te a hmun zawn mek a nih thu a sawi a, hei hi district-a VC ten an zin changa an chawlh leh an riahna tur, an hman tangkai em em thin a ni, a ti.

Hmeichhe representative te chungchang sawiin, Mizoram puma hmeichhe VC te tan thla tharah Chief Minister hovin training neih tum a nih thu a tarlang a. VC te dinhmun pawimawh zia tarlangin, grassroot level-a mipuite chhia leh tha thlen khawmna leh hmasawnna kailawn an ni, a ti. VC member graduate chin te chu IIM Shillong-ah kar khat chhung training neih tir an nih thu sawiin, Mizoram chhunga VC te intlawh tawnna leh hmalak dan tha (best practice) in zirtir tawnna buatsaih tum a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Pu Lalchawimawia, Joint Director (Admin), LAD pawhin thu sawiin Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) chungchang sawifiahna hun a hmang a. RGSA hi Central sawrkarin thinglang khuate anmahnia kea an din theihna atana a ruahman, VC te thiamna leh theihna ti punga hnathawk thei zawk an nih theih nana duan a nih thu a sawi. He scheme hi kum 5 chhung awh tur a ni a, 2023-26 hi Revamped RGSA niin 15th Finance Commission nena kal kawp tura ruahman a ni, a ti. State Panchayat Resource Centre, Aizawl leh SIRD ah te training neih thin a nih thu sawiin, Kolasib District ah Panchayat Bhavan 5 sak tawh a nih thu leh 2 sak tura ruahman mek a nih thu a tarlang. Kum 2025-26 atana computer set 346 zet lei a nih thu leh, tunah hian 98 sem mek a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin hun hi Pu Lalmuanpuia, DLAO Kolasib chuan a kaihruai a,  Kolasib district chhunga VC pathum - Hortoki-II, Phaisen leh North Chhimluang VC te hnenah computer hi hlan an ni. He hun hi Pu Lalhmingmawia, Joint Director, LAD chuan lawmthu sawina in a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: MBSE in HSLC, 2026 Result tichhuak dawn
content:
213/2026-2027

Aizawl the 20th April, 2026:Mizoram Board of School Education chuanApril ni 23, 2026chhun dar12:00hian rokhawlhna a awm loh chuan HSLC Examination, 2026 result tihchhuah a tum a. Result hi MBSE Office Chaltlangah leh MBSE Regional Office, Lunglei leh heng website – (a)www.mbse.edu.in(b)www.mbseonline.com–ah te hian en theihin a awm ang. A mamawh tan result bu lei theihin a awm bawk ang.

Heng a hnuaia number tarlanah te hian office hun chhungin result ngaihven theih a ni ang.

title: PUBLIC HOLIDAY PUANG
content:
212/2026-2027

Aizawl the 20th April, 2026:April 21, 2026 (Thawhlehni) hi Aizawl Municipal Corporation (AMC,2026) inthlanpui vote thlak ni a nih avangin Aizawl Municipality huam chhunga vote nei zawng zawng tan sorkarin public Holiday a puang. Naktukah hian AMC huam chhunga sorkar office, zirna in leh public sector zawng zawng khar vek tur a ni.

Attachment
